texto: I offer you a fable for our times...A magic box sits in your pocket with all the knowledge and music and entertainment of the world contained within it. If you opened this box and looked down into it......How could you ever possibly look up again?- Larry Ferrell (Unfollow)
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rob Williams que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I offer you a fable for our times...A magic box sits in your pocket with all the knowledge and mu…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, comics, technology, com foco em technology.
